query.title: Cohomology and representations of quantum groups
query.abstract: This manuscript studies cohomological methods for quantum groups and related algebraic structures. We investigate representations, homological invariants, and connections with Lie algebra cohomology.

recommendations.reason: The manuscript aligns with categorical symmetries, which is a strong theme in Annals of Representation Theory.
